reviews.review_title: Very early stage, cool concept though
reviews.review_description:
I have wanted a parametric CAD platform to create stuff in VR for a long time. This is not there yet, but it is very cool.

I would love to see more from this developer and see this platform continue to evolve.

I am not sure why you need to connect to a laptop.

developer_response.body: Hi and thanks for checking CADNodes and  leaving the review - I really appreciate it. You're right its a prototype with many essential features still missing but I am working on it so stay tuned. The laptop is needed for the geometry module to perform cad shapes calculations. The headset app is just a 3d terminal presenting calculations happening inside the web app on the PC/laptop. This simply was the quickest way for me to release the XR app while I am working on making it actually self contained and independent.
